title: Baby Bilingual Musical Elephant Stuffed Animals Toys,Infant Early Learning Toy with Light-Up Music & Crinkle,Tummy Time Toys for 0 3 6 9 12+ Months for Baby Boy Girl Gift,Pink
features: 7-in-1 MULTIFUNCTIONAL ELEPHANT TOY: This cute little elephant toy combines lights, music, letters, numbers,crinkle，squeakers and teethers in one, perfect for baby boys and girls aged 0-18+ months, this multifunctional toy can grow with your baby, learning and growing in entertainment. It is a perfect gift for birthdays or holidays

BABY MUSICAL TOYS: The cute elephant baby toy features three buttons, each with different music effects, including numbers 123, letters ABC，and 7 soothing baby songs. Pressing each button activates different sounds and lights, capturing the baby's curiosity and attention while helping to soothe them to sleep. Designed for babies aged 0-6-12 months, it enriches their sensory experience.Promote gross motor and tactile skills

BILINGUAL TOYS FOR BABY: This tummy time toy switches between English and Spanish to learn different music, numbers and letters with the baby elephant toy. This helps to build your baby's early language learning skills in a different and fun way, promoting cognitive development for babies 0-6 months and language learning skills for babies 6-12 months

BABY DETACHABLE HANGING LOOP: The elephant baby toys features a removable gripping ring and is lightweight and easy to carry. The plush elephant can be washed separately to ensure the toy stays clean and hygienic. Designed with two different modes of play for different developmental stages, 0-6 months and 6-12 months, this toy provides your baby with an engaging and adaptable playmate as he or she grows

SAFE BABY GIFT TOYS: Baby elephant toys are made of high-quality high-density filler, not easy to deform, all materials have passed strict safety tests, so you can rest assured that your baby to explore, to ensure the use of 0-3-6-12 months baby's safety; at the same time, it is also a baby christening, birthday, or any special occasions of the thoughtful and practical gifts
